ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data entry */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of demographic data */,
  "variable" TEXT /* Name of the demographic variable */,
  "single_regression" INTEGER /* Indicator for single regression analysis */,
  "index" INTEGER /* Index number for the variable */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name for the variable */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Geographical location ID */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size for the demographic data */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the demographic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health outcome */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the health outcome */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health outcome */,
  "related_demographics" TEXT /* Demographic variables related to this outcome */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Geographical location ID */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size for the health outcome data */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the health outcome data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "food_security" (
  "food_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each food security data entry */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of food security data */,
  "variable" TEXT /* Name of the food security variable */,
  "single_regression" INTEGER /* Indicator for single regression analysis */,
  "index" INTEGER /* Index number for the variable */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name for the variable */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Geographical location ID */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size for the food security data */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the food security data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("food_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regression_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regression analysis */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic variable */,
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health outcome */,
  "coefficient" REAL /* Regression coefficient */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value of the coefficient */,
  "interpretation" TEXT /* Interpretation of the regression result */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Geographical location ID */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the analysis was performed */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for regression analysis */,
  "r_squared" REAL /* R-squared value of the regression model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regression_analysis_outcome_id FOREIGN KEY ("outcome_id") REFERENCES health_outcomes ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regression_analysis_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "data_sources" TEXT /* Data sources used in the report */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Geographical location ID */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the report was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last date the report was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the report was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last date the role was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_permissions FOREIGN KEY ("permissions") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the permission was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last date the permission was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
